message:
feat(messaging): add IRC persistent sessions, Nostr relay health, Mattermost operations, Synology webhook normalize

IRC:
- Add session.rs with IrcPersistentSession for long-lived connections
- ConnectionState tracking, ring-buffer message history, nick-collision recovery
- DedupTracker for bounded cross-relay event deduplication

Nostr:
- Add relays_health operation with per-relay latency and NIP support scoring
- RelayHealthScore and DedupTracker structs with overflow tracking

Mattermost:
- Add get_reactions_for_post and create_group_channel operations
- Fix shutdown lifecycle: clear subscribed_topics before shutdown
- Add handle_shutdown_clears_stream_subscription_state test

Synology Chat:
- Add webhook_normalize operation for raw payload normalization
  with optional token verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
 min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
 protocol_features = []
 max_datagram_bytes = 65000
-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:83032732650d5dd374f8edfd3c299ec224d6ab8d8c16003af596fb0021cf7003"
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:bc27ff97696c469eb98f6964560fe9855597aec56df05865c7a570829e197997"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.mattermost"
@@ -583,3 +583,159 @@ require_sni = true
 [provides.operations."mattermost.delete_post".rate_limit]
 max = 10
 per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.get_reactions_for_post"]
+description = "Get all emoji reactions for a post"
+capability = "mattermost.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.get_reactions_for_post".input_schema]
+required = ["post_id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.get_reactions_for_post".input_schema.properties.post_id]
+description = "Post ID whose reactions should be listed"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.get_reactions_for_post".output_schema]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.get_reactions_for_post".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.example.com"]
+port_allow = [443, 8065]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = false
+require_sni = true
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.create_group_channel"]
+description = "Create or fetch a group direct-message channel for three or more users"
+capability = "mattermost.write"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.create_group_channel".input_schema]
+required = ["user_ids"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.create_group_channel".input_schema.properties.user_ids]
+description = "Three or more unique Mattermost user IDs"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.create_group_channel".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.create_group_channel".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.example.com"]
+port_allow = [443, 8065]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = false
+require_sni = true
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.create_group_channel".rate_limit]
+max = 10
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.update_post"]
+description = "Patch an existing post's text, props, or file attachments"
+capability = "mattermost.write"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.update_post".input_schema]
+required = ["id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.update_post".input_schema.properties.id]
+description = "Post ID to update"

+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.update_post".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.update_post".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.example.com"]
+port_allow = [443, 8065]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = false
+require_sni = true
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.update_post".rate_limit]
+max = 30
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.pin_post"]
+description = "Pin a post so it appears in the channel's pinned messages list"
+capability = "mattermost.write"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.pin_post".input_schema]
+required = ["post_id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.pin_post".input_schema.properties.post_id]
+description = "Post ID to pin"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.pin_post".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.pin_post".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.example.com"]
+port_allow = [443, 8065]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = false
+require_sni = true
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.pin_post".rate_limit]
+max = 60
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.unpin_post"]
+description = "Unpin a post from the channel's pinned messages list"
+capability = "mattermost.write"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "best_effort"

+required = ["post_id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.unpin_post".input_schema.properties.post_id]

+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.unpin_post".output_schema]
+type = "object"

+[provides.operations."mattermost.unpin_post".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["*.example.com"]
+port_allow = [443, 8065]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = false
+require_sni = true
+
+[provides.operations."mattermost.unpin_post".rate_limit]
+max = 60
+per_ms = 60000

@@ -60,6 +60,13 @@ risk = "low"
 safety_tier = "safe"
 idempotency = "strict"
 
+[provides.operations.relays_health]
+summary = "Score relay health with latency and NIP support metrics"
+capability = "nostr.health.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
 [sandbox]
 profile = "strict"
 memory_mb = 96

@@ -55,6 +55,16 @@ idempotency = "strict"
 [provides.operations.ingest_outgoing_webhook.ai_hints]
 when_to_use = "When fcp-host forwards an outgoing-webhook payload and you need stable channel, thread, sender, and attachment metadata"
 
+[provides.operations.webhook_normalize]
+summary = "Normalize a raw inbound Synology Chat webhook payload into a stable event envelope"
+capability = "synology_chat.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.webhook_normalize.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to normalize any inbound Synology Chat webhook payload into a stable event shape with optional token verification"
+
 [provides.operations.health]
 summary = "Report Synology Chat connector configuration and delivery target"
 capability = "synology_chat.read"
